LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONERS THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES IN THEIR CAPACITIES, CARPENTERS HEALTH AND WELFARE TRUST FUND FOR, CARPENTERS VACATION-HOLIDAY TRUST FUND FOR, CARPENTERS PENSION TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN, CARPENTERS ANNUITY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN, CARPENTERS TRAINING TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN, AND NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS OFF CALENDAR. MOVING PARTY DID NOT TIMELY FILE PROOF OF SERVICE FOR THE MOTION. (CAL. RULES OF COURT, RULE 3.1300(C); SEE ALSO CCP SEC. 1290.4). JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: ANN DELGADO, CSR # 11185, TEL. NO. (951)764-4047 (302/MJM)
MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-06-2014 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

Ntc Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Aug-06-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONERS THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES IN THEIR CAPACITIES, CARPENTERS HEALTH AND WELFARE TRUST FUND FOR, CARPENTERS VACATION-HOLIDAY TRUST FUND FOR, CARPENTERS PENSION TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN, CARPENTERS ANNUITY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN, CARPENTERS TRAINING TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN, and NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is Off calendar. Moving party did not timely file proof of service for the motion. (Cal. Rules of Court, rule 3.1300(c); see also CCP sec. 1290.4). Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Ann Delgado, CSR # 11185, Tel. No. (951)764-4047
